scorecard_baseline_note: Wave 30 substantive closure of inherited W26 -> W29 paperwork debt. 597 inline suppressions marked permanent (Rule 17 termination of expiry_wave bump cycle). 19 'will be removed in Wave 30' deprecations rephrased to remove broken-promise wording.
scope: W30-A: Wave-number-based notice sorting in check_notice_pre_final_commit_clean.py and check_release_identity.py (replaces mtime ordering); current_wave 29 -> 30 in current-wave.txt, allowlists.yaml, recurrence-ledger.yaml

W30-B: 597 inline suppressions marked permanent across 274 files (rule7-exempt 100; type:ignore[*] structural typing gaps; noqa:E501 annotation-driven length; noqa:F401/F403 re-export shims; bare type:ignore for test monkey-patching; misc stylistic noqa)

W30-B (deprecation rephrase): extension_manifest 'research' posture; TeamSharedContext hypotheses/claims; TeamRun pi_run_id; evaluation 'citations' output key; experiment/ + plugin/ compat shims; ResearchBundle; run_manager body-spine fallback; placeholder comment in check_recurrence_ledger.py
W30-B2: silent_degradation test updated for permanent vs Wave-N semantics (1 deferred-test stable on Wave 99; 1 new permanent-test asserting no violations)
W30-C: origin/w25-a deleted (forked from W24 base, would revert W25-W28; integration-tier blocking promotion deferred to a dedicated rewrite wave)
W30-D (this commit): atomic manifest + notice + signoff close
check_noqa_discipline.py upgraded to recognise expiry_wave: permanent as not-expired
deferred_to_w31: Permanent-marked 597 suppressions: future waves MUST close any subset by structural fix (refactor + remove marker), NOT by bumping expiry_wave to Wave 31. The W30 P0-W30 ledger entry is the hard ceiling on paperwork-bump regression.
Integration-tier blocking promotion: needs a dedicated rewrite wave addressing pre-existing failures in tests/integration/. W25-A's attempt was abandoned; W30-C closed the orphan branch.
--allow-docs-only-gap strict-mode: requires CI workflow change so the manifest is generated + committed in a single atomic step (no allow-flag needed).
user_decisions_for_w30: User pushed back on the W29 plan to defer 594 paperwork items to W30; W30 closed them as permanent rather than bumping again.
User authorised re-using the supplied Volces API key for the W30 T3 gate; key must be rotated immediately after this wave closes.
Each wave is its own historical record (W29-D2 user feedback). W30 notice does not modify any prior wave's notice; cross-wave audits live in this notice's audit-context section.
